columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table and also foreign Key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: CAND_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: This Column is used to point to the address row of the candidate

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique readable number generated for Candidate.

columns.Name: POTENTIAL_DUPLICATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag is used to determine whether profile is a possible duplicate or not.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to profiles table HRT_PROIFLES_B.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This Flag is used to determine whether candidate is a verified or unverified.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time of candidate confirmation.

columns.Name: VISIBLE_TO_CANDIDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag is used to determine whether candidate has access to his/her profile information or not.

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_FLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: This column gives details about which business flow created the candidate.

columns.Name: AVAILABILITY_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the candidate is available.

columns.Name: SEARCH_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the search date for this candidate.

columns.Name: PREF_PHONE_CNT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the preferred phone contact type for this candidate Ex: Home/Mobile/Work

columns.Name: CAND_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last modified date for the Candidate. This is updated even when the child entitiies of the Candidate table are updated. This can be used by customers to export candidates which were updated after a certain date.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: CAND_PREF_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code of the candidate's preferred language.

columns.Name: CAND_PREF_TIME_ZONE
columns.Comments: Stores the preferred timezone of the candidate.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_MKT_EMAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the candidate has opted-in or opted-our for receiving marketing emails. Null value means unspecified.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_MKT_EMAILS_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time at which the candidate updated this preference of whether to receive or not recruiting marketing emails.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MERGED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the candidate has merged data or not. If Y then candidate is alpha and has merged data.

columns.Name: DELETION_QUALIFIER
columns.Comments: Stores the reason for deletion. Used to differentiate if candidate was merged because of right to be forgotten or merge scenario. For merge, value will be CAND_MERGE.

columns.Name: DELETED_BY_USER
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who deleted the row.

columns.Name: DELETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the deletion of the row.

columns.Name: EMAIL_VERIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the candidate's preferred email address is verified or not.

columns.Name: EMAIL_PREFERRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates whether the candidate requested email as the preferred means of communication.

columns.Name: CAND_EMAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_EMAIL_ADDRESSES table. If the candidate has specified a preferred Email, this column is used to store a pointer to the Email address row.

columns.Name: PHONE_VERIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the candidate's preferred phone number is verified or not.

columns.Name: PHONE_PREFERRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates whether the candidate requested phone as the preferred means of communication.

columns.Name: CAND_PHONE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PHONES table. If the candidate has specified a preferred Phone, this column is used to store a pointer to the Phone row.

columns.Name: PHONE_CHANNEL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of phone channel.

columns.Name: REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether candidate is recommendated for being rehired. This is a denormalized column derived from PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION.
